prompt: Create a glossy futuristic anime itasha supercar scene in a dreamy pastel sci-fi city. A low, aggressive white and pale lavender hypercar is parked in the foreground at a three-quarter front view, with sharp aerodynamic bodywork, transparent canopy-style windshield, large chrome multi-spoke wheels, a tall rear wing, angular intakes, and blue-purple neon LED strips along the headlights, hood seam, front splitter, and side skirts. The car wrap is a delicate sakura-and-crystal design with pale blue floral patterns, icy lavender gradients, and anime idol portrait decals: exactly 2 large visible character portraits, one full-color portrait on the hood and one portrait on the left door panel; include subtle branding text reading LUMIÈRE LUNE and a small blue flower emblem on the nose and side. Beside the car on the right stands a young anime-style woman, wearing a futuristic white-silver idol dress with sheer off-shoulder sleeves, structured bodice, short pleated skirt, silver belt, thigh-high pale boots, and soft brown shoulder-length hair; she rests one hand on the car and raises the other hand in a graceful presenting pose, with her face softly simplified and not detailed. The background is an expansive utopian floating city with shimmering water canals and reflective walkways, filled with tall glass spires, needle towers, saucer-shaped sky platforms, and blue glowing accents, under a bright clear sky with fluffy clouds. Add a large blooming cherry blossom tree on the right, pink petals drifting through the air and scattered on the mirror-like wet pavement. Use cinematic ultra-detailed digital art, luminous pastel palette, high-end automotive concept rendering, reflective surfaces, soft bloom, dreamy atmosphere, sharp foreground focus with slightly hazy distant city depth. Use a wide landscape composition, 4:3 aspect ratio, no roads, no extra people, no watermark, no readable text other than the specified car branding.
